untranslatable_reason: This signal requires pairs trading analysis with correlation and cointegration calculations between two separate market series. The backtest engine's allowed indicators are single-market technical indicators (RSI, MACD, moving averages, etc.). Correlation and cointegration require cross-market statistical analysis that is not supported by the available indicator set. These metrics must be computed externally before signal generation.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_13 is a statistical pairs trading signal that cannot be expressed using single-market price-action indicators. It requires: (1) Real-time correlation computation between two asset series (0.5-0.7 range), and (2) Cointegration testing to identify mean-reversion opportunities. Neither correlation nor cointegration are available in the allowed indicator list. This signal requires a separate pairs-trading module outside the standard backtest engine.
